# MiddlewareEngine Project Instructions

## Project Overview
ASP.NET Core 8.0 MiddlewareEngine application with MongoDB integration for dynamic function execution.

## Completed Steps
- ✅ Created .github/copilot-instructions.md file
- ✅ Obtained project setup information
- ✅ Scaffolded ASP.NET Core Web API project
- ✅ Created MongoDB models and configurations
- ✅ Created repositories and services
- ✅ Created execution engine and handlers
- ✅ Created API controllers
- ✅ Installed dependencies and compiled
- ✅ Created README documentation

## Project Features
- Function definitions stored in MongoDB
- Dynamic function execution by ID
- Support for REST API, SCPI commands, and SDK methods
- Repository pattern with MongoDB
- Dependency injection
- Error handling and logging
